Minor'S Compromise.
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha , CSR: Lavena Ward #7077 (Department 218)

Appearances
Petitioner, Maria Frias, is present as Guardian ad litem for Andrea Frias and Stephanie Frias, the minors Claimant, who are also present.
Attorney, T. Troy Otus, appearing on behalf of the petitioner and claimants.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as to the two minor claimants as follws:

As to Andrea Frias, the total gross amount of the settlement in favor of the claimant is $2,750.00. From the total judgment of $2,750.00, payment of fees is to be disbursed as follows: attorneys fees in the sum of $688.00 payable to T. Troy Otus, reimbursement for medical and all other expenses expenses paid by the petitioner or attorney in the sum of $370.00 payable to Healthcare Recoveries. The balance of the judgment available for the claimant after payment of all allowed fess and expenses is $1,693.00. Said amount shall be payable to petitioner, Maria Frias, for the benefit of the minor child. Order Approving Compromise of Disputed Claim is to be submitted to the Court for signature.

As Stephanie Frias, the total gross amount of the settlement in favor of the claimant is $5,000.00. From the total judgment of $5,000.00, payment of fees is to be disbursed as follows: attorneys fees in the sum of $1,250.00 payable to T. Troy Otus, reimbursement for medical and all other expenses expenses paid by the petitioner or attorney in the sum of $370.00 and $350.00 payable to Healthcare Recoveries. The balance of the judgment available for the claimant after payment of all allowed fess and expenses is $3,380.00. Said amount shall be payable to petitioner, Maria Frias, for the benefit of the minor child. Order Approving Compromise of Disputed Claim is to be submitted to the Court for signature.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories and Request For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $310, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2006 Continued To Mar-27-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Misael Hernandez' Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The first day this motion could have been heard would have been December 11, 2006. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
